migration_policy: additive until 1.x; breaking changes require migration note, fixture update, backwards-compatibility decision, explicit reviewer approval
description: Two-lane source-verification ledger. Lane 1 (operator_fetch_attempts) records what THIS execution environment could reach; every ISC2 and third-party URL returned HTTP 403 here (Cloudflare-fronted egress). Lane 2 (reviewer_attestations) records official-source confirmations made from the reviewer's environment, which can reach the same URLs. A source may only carry an 'official*' confidence when the operator fetched it directly OR a reviewer attestation backs it (enforced by cc_spine.sources).
operator_environment: Claude Code remote execution environment (agent proxy egress). ISC2 pages, the direct 2026 outline PDF, the exam-outline index, and two Cloudflare-fronted third-party hosts all returned HTTP 403 on 2026-07-04.
